title: Building a Bilingual RAG System for Nepali Government Services
excerpt: How I used BAAI/bge-m3 embeddings and a vector database to build SarkariSathi — a chatbot that answers citizen queries about government services in both Nepali and English.

title: Running YOLO on a Budget: Edge Inference with TensorFlow Lite
excerpt: A walkthrough of how I deployed real-time object detection on old Android hardware for HomeCam — quantization tricks, latency trade-offs, and lessons learned.

title: Automating Resume Screening with spaCy and Cosine Similarity
excerpt: How I built ResuMatch — an NLP pipeline that extracts skills using Named Entity Recognition and ranks candidates against job descriptions without any LLM API costs.

title: Building a Website for 2,000+ Students: Lessons from the FSU Project
excerpt: What I learned directing the development of the official Free Students' Union website at Pulchowk Campus — from requirements gathering with elected reps to deployment.
